title: Time-boxed owner status collection — reply by EOD Mon June 22
description: SUPERSEDES task 58b098e4 (created June 12, still pending and unactioned). Second consecutive blackout Friday: 28 days, zero owner updates, and the June 12 ask drew no response. For the Monday memo, get each owner to reply in-thread with a one-line status + new due date by EOD Mon June 22, or the item is formally marked Stalled and surfaced to the CEO directly. Priority order: A-020 bridge loan (Critical runway R-012), A-022/A-028 Series B materials (LOI May 30 outcome still unknown — confirm Series B/runway status), A-025 Priya Mehta retention (R-006 now High), A-023 Meridian freeze comms (confirm-and-close — GA window passed June 15). Also supply the names behind CEO/CFO/CPO/CRO so the tracker meets its own named-owner policy (requested June 12, still outstanding). Full report: actions/friday-chase-2026-06-19.md.
